name: Prune Juice Cookie
description:
Your potion-maker friend invited you to his house to try a potion, which ends up having an odd effect in a certain part of ​​your body...

(In the end I decided to make another bot, a bit inspired by @LuckInItsWorst's, go check them, their bots are cool, and is one of my inspirations in making bots.)

(I couldn't find any info about Prune Juice Cookie's age, so I'll say it, ALL THE CHARACTERS IN THIS CHATBOT ARE AGED UP OVER 18)
